```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
totals <- read_csv("url_csvs/totals_2023.csv")
totals_g <- read_csv("url_csvs/totalsg_2023.csv")

combined_totals <- totals |> inner_join(totals_g, join_by(Institution, Conference))

attend <- read_csv("url_csvs/attendance_2023.csv")

totals_2023 <- combined_totals |> inner_join(attend, join_by(Institution, Conference))

write_csv(totals_2023, "~/code/SportsDataTextbook/data/ncaa_womens_soccer_totals_2023.csv")
write_csv(totals_2023, "~/code/dwillis.github.io/docs/sports-data-files/ncaa_womens_soccer_totals_2023.csv")
```
